name: generate_image
description: Generate images from text prompts using state-of-the-art diffusion models like FLUX and Stable Diffusion. Returns the generated image as binary data (PNG/JPEG).

parameters.name: model_id
parameters.description: The image generation model ID in 'org/model' format.

parameters.name: inputs
parameters.description: The text prompt describing the image to generate.
parameters.example: A serene lake surrounded by mountains at sunset, photorealistic style

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Generation parameters including guidance_scale, num_inference_steps, width, height, and negative_prompt.

body.inputs: A serene lake surrounded by mountains at sunset, photorealistic style
